changed.summary: Added new 'analyze' command that generates SYSTEM_DELTA.json by calling Claude API with git diff and optional topology mapping
changed.before: Command-line interface with review, diff, init, and serve commands
structural_changes: Added command: analyze with options for topology path, output path, base ref, intent hint, model selection, verbose mode, and dry-run

changed.summary: Modified to automatically invoke 'differ analyze' before launching review server and increased timeout to accommodate Claude API calls
changed.before: Hook that launched serve-review.sh only when both topology.json and SYSTEM_DELTA.json existed
structural_changes: Modified command to call 'node dist/cli.js analyze' before serve script
Removed SYSTEM_DELTA.json existence check (now generated on-demand)

edges_added.description: analyze command invokes analyzeDiff() and buildPrompt() to generate semantic deltas
hook invokes 'differ analyze' command before launching serve-review.sh

intent: Add differ analyze command — AI-generated semantic analysis from git diffs

decision_trace.decision: Generate SYSTEM_DELTA.json on-demand via Claude API rather than requiring manual creation
alternatives: Integrate with existing external diff tools
decision_trace.rationale: Automates semantic analysis by leveraging Claude's code understanding, eliminating manual delta authoring and enabling real-time architectural insights

decision_trace.decision: Make topology.json optional for analyze command
alternatives: Fail with error if topology missing
decision_trace.rationale: Allows basic git diff semantic analysis even in repos without topology, lowering adoption barrier while still providing node-mapped insights when topology exists

decision_trace.decision: Invoke analyze automatically in Stop hook before serve
alternatives: Require developers to run analyze manually
decision_trace.rationale: Ensures SYSTEM_DELTA.json is always fresh when local changes occur, enabling immediate architectural review without extra steps

decision_trace.decision: Increase Stop hook timeout from 10s to 130s
alternatives: Keep 10s timeout and handle failures gracefully
decision_trace.rationale: Claude API calls require significantly more time than just launching server; 130s accommodates typical LLM response latency plus diff processing

decision_trace.decision: Support dry-run and verbose modes for analyze command
alternatives: Log prompt to separate debug file
decision_trace.rationale: Enables debugging of prompt construction and Claude responses, important for iterating on analysis quality and troubleshooting failures
